pi_items.source: export_result.sh checks for these strings using grep -qi "LOG IN\|Log In\|Create Account\|Welcome"
export_result.sh only checks for 'Add New Friend'. 'Friends List' is never explicitly checked.
export_result.sh defines PKG="com.robert.fcView" and web search confirms this is the package for Flight Crew View.

privileged_info_summary: The task interacts with the real-world Android app Flight Crew View (com.robert.fcView). Evaluation is based on UI dumps and VLM confirmation. The scripts verify the presence of 'LOG IN', 'Log In', 'Create Account', or 'Welcome' and strictly check for the absence of 'Add New Friend', but contradict the metadata by never explicitly checking for the string 'Friends List'.
